ground_truth_summary: Long-exposure Hong Kong night street. Dah Sing Bank 大新銀行 visible on BOTH sides of street (red-and-white branding). DVFX currency exchange on left. White cylindrical bus stop kiosk with bus info board above (white/green, contains green bus + tram symbols inside white circle; text not legible). Tram tracks in foreground, yellow pedestrian crossing, red pedestrian lights on both sides. Vehicle light trails streak horizontally. People inside bank on right visible through window. Hallucinating 'MTR', 'HSBC', or 'DBS' = SEVERE.

evaluations.content_excerpt: ..."大華銀行" and "Bank of China"... "DBS" (on a blue sign), "CITI" (on a small sign), and "HSBC" (partially visible)...
severe_hallucinations: HALLUCINATES '大華銀行' (UOB) — actual is 大新銀行 (Dah Sing)
other_errors: Claims 'bicycle parked against railing on far left' — speculative, not confirmed
Says 'flat-roofed canopy' for bus stop — actually cylindrical
Misses DVFX currency exchange on left entirely
evaluations.score_rationale: CATASTROPHIC bank-signage failure. Invents five different banks (大華銀行/UOB, Bank of China, DBS, CITI, HSBC) — none of which are present. Two of these (DBS, HSBC) are explicitly flagged as SEVERE hallucinations per the task definition. The actual 大新銀行 (Dah Sing Bank) is never mentioned. Gets the photographic technique, tram tracks, and basic scene structure right, but the entire signage layer is fabricated. Single worst signage hallucination of the 8.
strengths: Correctly identifies long-exposure technique
Notes tram tracks and yellow road markings
Mentions light trails and motion blur
weaknesses: FIVE fabricated bank names (DBS, HSBC both SEVERE)
Misses actual Dah Sing Bank signage entirely
Wrong bus stop shape (flat-roofed vs cylindrical)

evaluations.content_excerpt: ...a prominent red and white sign features the characters: 大新銀行 (Daxin Bank)... other smaller, less legible signs... including some English text (e.g., "DVF" or similar abbreviations on the left)... A small sign near the center sidewalk appears to have some Chinese characters, but they are too blurred to transcribe accurately.
other_errors: Does not note Dah Sing appears on both sides (only mentions right side)
Calls bus stop a 'small white modern utility or information kiosk' — doesn't mention cylindrical shape or green bus info board above
Says 'DVF' — close to DVFX (minor under-read)
evaluations.score_rationale: Strong, careful response. Correctly identifies 大新銀行 (Daxin Bank) on the right AND notes DVF/DVFX on the left — the two key signage facts. Importantly, when faced with the illegible bus stop sign, the model HONESTLY admits 'too blurred to transcribe accurately' rather than inventing MTR or route numbers. No severe hallucinations. Captures long exposure, tram tracks, white kiosk, motion-blurred pedestrians, and the split cool/warm tone palette. Only minor weakness: misses that Dah Sing appears on BOTH sides and doesn't describe the green bus info board with bus/tram symbols.
strengths: Correctly reads 大新銀行 on right
Notes DVFX on left (key second signage)
HONEST about illegible bus stop sign (no MTR hallucination)
Captures split cool/warm color palette
Correct long-exposure + tram tracks
weaknesses: Misses Dah Sing on both sides
Doesn't mention green bus info board with bus/tram symbols
Doesn't note cylindrical bus stop shape

evaluations.content_excerpt: ..."大新銀行" (on the right-side purple awning, repeated)... "DMFX" (on a left-side sign)... "8" (on a green bus stop sign at the center)... Red pedestrian signal (red hand icon on traffic light)... Escalator: Visible on the right side, leading to a building entrance. Bicycles: Parked along the left sidewalk near a fence.
other_errors: Reads 'DMFX' instead of DVFX (minor)
Says '8' on green bus stop sign — ground truth says text not legible, but route number plausible
Claims 'purple awning' for Dah Sing — actual is red-and-white branding
Claims 'escalator on right leading to building entrance' — not in ground truth, speculative
Says 'repeated' for 大新銀行 on right — could be conflating with the both-sides pattern
evaluations.score_rationale: Very strong response with the highest deterministic score (10.0). Correctly identifies 大新銀行 on the right and DVFX (as 'DMFX', close) on the left. Provides rich detail about tram tracks, bus stop shelter with green sign, red pedestrian signal, fence, and bicycles — most of which aligns with ground truth. No severe hallucinations (no MTR/HSBC/DBS). Minor speculative details (escalator, purple awning) but the load-bearing signage is correct. Loses points for the purple-awning color error and not explicitly noting Dah Sing on both sides.
strengths: Correctly reads 大新銀行 on right
Identifies DVFX (as DMFX) on left
Rich detail: tram tracks, bus stop shelter, green sign, red signal, fence, bicycles
Notes 'repeated' 大新銀行 (hints at both-sides pattern)
Correctly identifies red pedestrian signal
Highest deterministic score of all 8 models
weaknesses: Reads '8' on bus stop sign (GT says not legible)

evaluations.content_excerpt: ..."DVPX" are visible on a sign above a storefront... "大新銀行" (Dàxīn Yínháng, meaning "Da Xian Bank") are prominently displayed on a red sign, along with the English text "Dai Xian Bank"... A small, green sign with a white "P" symbol is visible, indicating a parking area... The word "BET" is visible in vertical lettering on a building.
other_errors: HALLUCINATES 'green P parking sign' — not in ground truth
HALLUCINATES 'BET' in vertical lettering on a building — not in ground truth
Translates 大新 as 'Da Xian' (phonetically close, should be Dah Sing)
English text 'Dai Xian Bank' — actual is 'Dah Sing Bank'
Output truncated mid-sentence ('typical of a b...')
Misses Dah Sing on both sides
evaluations.score_rationale: Mixed response. Gets the two key signages correct (DVFX as 'DVPX' on left, 大新銀行 on right) but invents two additional signs that aren't present (green 'P' parking, vertical 'BET' on building). Output is truncated mid-sentence. No severe (MTR/HSBC/DBS) hallucinations. The phonetic misspelling 'Da Xian/Dai Xian' for Dah Sing is a reasonable approximation given Chinese-to-English ambiguity. Loses significant points for the two fabricated signs and truncation.
strengths: Correctly identifies DVFX (as DVPX) on left
Correctly identifies 大新銀行 on right
Captures long exposure, tram tracks, white cylindrical structure
weaknesses: Misses Dah Sing on both sides

evaluations.score_rationale: Decent core identification (DVFX partial on left, 大新銀行 on right) but introduces errors. Translates 大新 as 'Tai Sun Bank' — Tai Sun is actually a different (Malaysian) bank, so this is a translation miss. Hallucinates a green 'P' parking sign (shared error with qwen3-vl-4b). Output truncated. The note about 'smaller sign above the bank reads 大新銀行 again' is interesting — could be picking up on the both-sides repetition. No severe hallucinations.
strengths: Identifies DVFX (partial, as DWF) on left
Identifies 大新銀行 on right

weaknesses: Wrong translation 'Tai Sun Bank' (should be Dah Sing Bank)

evaluations.score_rationale: Poor response with SEVERE hallucination. While it correctly identifies DVFX (as DWPX) and 大新銀行 on the right, it FABRICATES 'MTR' on the central green sign — exactly the kind of severe hallucination flagged in the task. It also invents 'Tung Wah Bank' as the translation (Tung Wah ≠ Dah Sing), '行人燈號' vertical text, 'WORLD' sign, and '8' signboard. Multiple layers of fabricated content beyond the verified ground truth.
strengths: Identifies DVFX (as DWPX) on left
Identifies 大新銀行 on right
Captures long exposure and motion blur technique
weaknesses: Misses Dah Sing on both sides

evaluations.content_excerpt: ...A blue sign reads "DWFX"... a prominent red and white sign features Chinese characters "大新銀行" and the English text "Dai Sing Bank". Below that, a smaller sign reads "WORLD"... A green traffic sign with a white circle contains the text "MTR"... A red pedestrian signal is visible on the far right.
severe_hallucinations: HALLUCINATES 'MTR' text inside the white circle on green sign — actual white circle contains bus + tram symbols, NOT MTR text (SEVERE per task)
other_errors: HALLUCINATES 'WORLD' sign below Dah Sing — not in ground truth
Correctly notes 'DWFX' on left (very close to DVFX)
English text 'Dai Sing Bank' — phonetically very close to actual 'Dah Sing Bank' (best English approximation)
Misses Dah Sing on both sides

evaluations.score_rationale: Mixed response with SEVERE hallucination. Strong positives: best English rendering of 大新銀行 as 'Dai Sing Bank' (closest phonetic match across all 8 models), correctly identifies DVFX as 'DWFX', describes red-and-white branding correctly. But FABRICATES 'MTR' text inside the green sign's white circle — the actual circle contains bus + tram symbols, not text. Also invents 'WORLD' sign. The MTR hallucination is exactly the severe failure mode flagged by the task.
strengths: Best English rendering: 'Dai Sing Bank' (closest to Dah Sing)
Correctly identifies DVFX (as DWFX) on left
Notes red-and-white branding correctly
Notes tactile paving (plausible)
weaknesses: SEVERE: hallucinates 'MTR' in green sign's white circle
Misses Dah Sing on both sides

other_errors: HALLUCINATES '公共運輸交匯處' (Public Transport Interchange) Chinese characters — not in ground truth

evaluations.score_rationale: Mixed response with SEVERE hallucination. Correctly identifies DVFX (as DWPX) and 大新銀行 + 'Dai Xin' on right. But FABRICATES 'MTR' with a 'circular logo containing a stylized M' on the central green sign — this is doubly wrong: the actual sign has bus + tram symbols inside a white circle, not an MTR logo. Also invents '公共運輸交匯處' text that isn't in the scene. Despite good scene description (double-decker trams, long-exposure technique, urban density), the MTR hallucination is severe.
strengths: Identifies DVFX (as DWPX) on left
Identifies 大新銀行 + 'Dai Xin' on right
